Work experience

  • Embedded Software Engineer @ Harman International (April 2023 - Present)

    • Currently working on system and power management programming for a connectivity gateway SoC, for different car brands.
    • Tech stack: C/C++, Linux, CMake, Yocto

  • Programmer Analyst @ LTCN & CSTP highschools (2021 - April 2023)

    • Administered and maintained the organizations network infrastructure, including network expansion, network equipment configuration, Linux server administration, and related IT systems.
    • Maintained and supported printing and communication equipment.
    • Managed the institutions records and data within the National Education Database.
    • Administered the institutions information in the Integrated Information System for Education in Romania.
    • Contributed to the planning, organization, and administration of national examinations.
